title: primitive_proposal (v1)
description: Proposal for a new substrate primitive or sub-type. Mandatory for Tier-3 (Tier-F bundle) and Tier-4 (multiple per fire). Required-fields list enforces HARD-5 at write time: bare-noun coordinate names ('rank', 'complexity', 'dimension', 'degree' alone) are rejected; distinct coordinates must be carried as distinct fields.

name.description: Proposed primitive name. UpperCamelCase. Bare-noun ambiguous coordinate names ('Rank', 'Complexity', 'Dimension', 'Degree' alone) are REJECTED — disambiguate at proposal time.

parent_class.title: Parent substrate class
parent_class.description: The existing substrate class this primitive sits under. UpperCamelCase. Examples: ConstructiveExistenceWitness, MomentPolytope, RepresentationTheoreticInvariant, ComputationalComplexityCertificate.

composition_eligibility.title: Cross-tier composition flags
composition_eligibility.description: List of tiers this primitive composes with, plus a one-sentence rationale per composition. Per fire-#43 substrate-design finding: cross-tier composition is the bottleneck of substrate evolution.

required.description: true = this composition is mandatory for the primitive to fulfill its substrate role; false = optional but supported.

required_fields.title: Required fields the primitive must carry (HARD-5 enforced)
required_fields.description: List of {field_name, type} pairs. Field names are snake_case and MUST disambiguate ambiguous coordinates ('rank' alone is rejected; 'border_rank', 'slice_rank', 'cactus_rank' etc. are accepted). Per the 2026-05-11 derive_kill_signature audit finding: write-time HARD-5 enforcement catches collapsing of distinct coordinates that would silently leak across registries.

anti_anchor_pins.title: Anti-anchor IDs this primitive pins / addresses
anti_anchor_pins.description: Cross-references to AA-NNN entries this primitive's existence is motivated by. Cross-reference checked at validate-time.

downstream_consumer.title: Who consumes this primitive once registered
downstream_consumer.description: Free-form name of the substrate-tester probe / Ergon script / catalog edit / agent that will read or emit instances of this primitive.

composition_eligibility.rationale: Composes with PhaseTransitionThreshold when the bound is parameterized by tensor format dimensions.
